availability_matrix.name: Raya
availability_matrix.note: Arsenal rotated heavily as title winners. Raya worked individually in training Thursday and did not feature in the GW38 matchday squad. Confirmed rest by Arteta ahead of Champions League final. Source: Fantasy Football Scout GW38 team news 24 May 2026.

availability_matrix.name: Gabriel
availability_matrix.note: Season-ending hamstring surgery confirmed. Ruled out for remainder of 2025/26 and targeting pre-season 2026/27. FPL status DOUBTFUL is stale and critically understated — actual status is OUT. Source: ESPN, Premier League official, Arsenal.com injury update.

availability_matrix.name: Gvardiol
availability_matrix.note: Confirmed starter in Man City GW38 XI vs Aston Villa at left centre-back. FPL status AVAILABLE is accurate. Source: Manchester City official team news, WhoScored GW38 lineup.

availability_matrix.name: Aina
availability_matrix.note: No injury news in FPL or news.json. Forest home vs Bournemouth. Mild end-of-season dead rubber rotation risk but no fitness concern flagged. FPL AVAILABLE.

availability_matrix.name: M.Salah
availability_matrix.note: Confirmed starter for Liverpool's GW38 farewell match. Salah said goodbye to Liverpool fans after the fixture. Liverpool needed result for Champions League qualification — strong motivation. FPL AVAILABLE is correct. Source: Fantasy Football Scout GW38 team news, ESPN final day live.

availability_matrix.name: Mbeumo
availability_matrix.note: Expected starter for Brentford. No injury concerns in FPL or news.json. Fellow Brentford players Henry, Milambo, Carvalho are all OUT but Mbeumo is clear. Source: RotoWire GW38 buy/hold/sell.

availability_matrix.name: Rogers
availability_matrix.note: No injury flag in FPL or news.json. Aston Villa fighting for Champions League place adds strong motivation to play key assets from the start. Moderate rotation risk only if CL spot is already secured before kick-off. FPL AVAILABLE.

availability_matrix.name: Anderson
availability_matrix.note: No injury news. Forest home vs Bournemouth. Gibbs-White attracted heaviest GW38 NFO ownership (90k+), suggesting he may be the preferred creative route, but no fitness concern flags Anderson. FPL AVAILABLE.

availability_matrix.name: Bowen
availability_matrix.note: Top GW38 transfer target (134k+ new owners). West Ham home vs Leeds United in a meaningful match. Bowen confirmed expected starter with two recent double-figure hauls at London Stadium. User's captain. FPL AVAILABLE confirmed. Source: Fantasy Football Scout, Never Manage Alone GW38 player picks.

availability_matrix.name: Mateta
availability_matrix.note: Confirmed in Crystal Palace GW38 starting XI vs Man City. Started after recent scoring form off the bench. FPL AVAILABLE is correct. Source: CPFC match centre, WhoScored GW38 lineup.

availability_matrix.name: Wood
availability_matrix.note: No injury concerns in news.json. Forest home vs Bournemouth. End-of-season dead rubber potential introduces mild rotation risk but Wood is a consistent fixture starter. FPL AVAILABLE.

availability_matrix.name: Sels
availability_matrix.note: No injury news. Forest GK for home fixture. Rotation risk minimal for goalkeepers at non-elite clubs. FPL AVAILABLE. Bench cover with 1 xPts logged in features.json.

availability_matrix.name: Haaland
availability_matrix.note: Confirmed absent for GW38. Guardiola deliberately omitted Haaland from Man City squad vs Aston Villa to rest him ahead of 2026 World Cup with Norway. Golden Boot secured with 27 goals. FPL status UNAVAILABLE is accurate. Source: Goal.com, Yahoo Sports, Inkl — multiple confirmations.

availability_matrix.name: Munoz
availability_matrix.note: Confirmed in Crystal Palace GW38 starting XI at right-back vs Man City. FPL AVAILABLE is correct. Source: CPFC match centre lineup.

availability_matrix.name: Kluivert
availability_matrix.note: No injury flag in FPL or news.json. Bournemouth away fixture. No relegation or European pressure — moderate end-of-season rotation risk. FPL AVAILABLE.

critical_absences: Haaland (MCI/FWD) — CONFIRMED OUT GW38. Rested by Guardiola for World Cup load management. 15.1m asset returning 0 points. FPL UNAVAILABLE flag is accurate.

Gabriel (ARS/DEF) — CONFIRMED OUT, season over. Hamstring surgery confirmed by Arsenal and ESPN. FPL DOUBTFUL flag is critically understated — player is OUT for remainder of 2025/26 and into 2026/27 pre-season.
Raya (ARS/GK) — CONFIRMED OUT GW38. Arteta rested the starting GK as part of wholesale Arsenal rotation following Premier League title win. Not selected in GW38 matchday squad.
summary: GW38 availability is heavily impacted by Arsenal's title-celebration rotation and Man City load management. Three owned players confirmed absent: Haaland (World Cup rest, FPL UNAVAILABLE accurate), Gabriel (season-ending hamstring surgery — FPL DOUBTFUL flag is dangerously stale, he is OUT), and Raya (Arsenal wholesale rotation, not in squad). User captain Bowen has no fitness concerns and is a confirmed GW38 starter in a meaningful West Ham home fixture. Salah started his Liverpool farewell. Gvardiol, Mateta, and Munoz all appeared in their confirmed GW38 XIs. NFO triple (Aina, Anderson, Wood) carry mild rotation risk as a potential dead rubber but carry no injury flags. No returning asset of note for GW38.
